hooks.command: FP=$(cat | jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // .tool_input.notebook_path // empty'); if echo "$FP" | grep -Eq '/src/.*\.(ts|tsx)$'; then cd "/Users/gale/Library/Mobile Documents/com~apple~CloudDocs/poke_fantasy" || exit 0; OUT=$(npm run verify 2>&1); CODE=$?; if [ $CODE -ne 0 ]; then echo "$OUT" | tail -150; exit 2; fi; fi
